achievements.title: Rookietown's Pacifists Bike Club

achievements.description: Visit secret place for Janken-game with Cape as a prize on Sky Castle level (items cheat allowed) (not two other obvious places with Cape as a prize)

achievements.description: Use both most effective shortcuts on Sky Castle level (items cheat allowed)

achievements.title: Get Rich or Die Trying
achievements.description: Collect 6,000 gold without dying (Normal or Hard difficulty, items cheat allowed) (only gold collected before reaching 9,990 limit counts)
